title: AI Blue Team
description: AI Blue Team Service provides continuous security monitoring for AI systems. It detects AI-specific threats like prompt injection and sensitive information disclosure, offering real-time alerts and customized protection based on evolving threat intelligence.

items: Detect task replay, infinite delegation, or hallucination loops.
LLM Incident Detection & Response, Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
